notes: Pricing page lists developer API credits: $25 for 500 credits and $0.05 per 1,000-word credit.

Official GPTZero API Pricing section lists 300k words/month for $45, 1m for $135, 2m for $250, 5m for $550, 10m for $1000, and 20m for $1850; after the base plan allotment, additional usage is $150 per million words.

Official Anthropic docs list Claude Opus 4.8 as API model claude-opus-4-8, with standard pricing of $5 per million input tokens and $25 per million output tokens. This is an LLM final-text baseline, not a commercial detector vendor. Token estimate: 27928 input + 2880 output tokens.
